log.title: Week 10 resolution
log.text:
No new gear this week. The clinic runs on what it already has.

Pastry Wall Install: You commission a pastry wall for the lobby. ThriveWell Annex goes quiet for a day.

Week 10 closes. Daphne Novak adds 3.0 lb. Celeste Mori leaves 0.8 lb heavier.

No formal stage change this week. Tighter buttons. Louder stomachs. Small signs.

Bills $874. Net -$874. 0 new patients waitlisted. Reputation does the recruiting now.

log.title: Week 9 resolution
log.text:
No new gear this week. The clinic runs on what it already has.

Button Crisis Monday: Three staff report button failures before nine a.m. Safety pins sell out at the corner store.

Week 9 closes. Daphne Novak adds 4.0 lb. Celeste Mori leaves 0.4 lb heavier.

No formal stage change this week. Tighter buttons. Louder stomachs. Small signs.

Bills $874. Net -$874. 0 new patients waitlisted. Reputation does the recruiting now.

log.title: Week 8 resolution
log.text:
No new gear this week. The clinic runs on what it already has.

Ice Cream Summer: Patient trust gains +15% from events.

Word of Mouth: A patient tells a friend the clinic "gets it." Reputation ticks up without ad spend.

Week 8 closes. Daphne Novak adds 2.6 lb. Celeste Mori leaves 0.5 lb heavier.

No formal stage change this week. Tighter buttons. Louder stomachs. Small signs.

Bills $874. Net -$874. 0 new patients waitlisted. Reputation does the recruiting now.

log.title: Week 7 resolution
log.text:
No new gear this week. The clinic runs on what it already has.

Ice Cream Summer: Patient trust gains +15% from events.

Mole Defection: A patient admits she was sent from ThriveWell. She stayed for the vending wall. She wants an appointment card.

Patient Poach: ThriveWell offers your regulars a "detox month." One patient almost leaves. Elena blocks the door with her hips. Literally.

Week 7 closes. Daphne Novak adds 2.1 lb. Celeste Mori leaves 0.9 lb heavier.

No formal stage change this week. Tighter buttons. Louder stomachs. Small signs.

Bills $874. Net -$874. 0 new patients waitlisted. Reputation does the recruiting now.

log.title: Week 6 resolution
log.text:
No new gear this week. The clinic runs on what it already has.

Ice Cream Summer: Patient trust gains +15% from events.

Annex Rumor Mill: Rumor: ThriveWell patients sneak over for your vending wall. Reputation ticks up without ad spend.

Week 6 closes. Daphne Novak adds 3.4 lb. Celeste Mori leaves 0.8 lb heavier.

No formal stage change this week. Tighter buttons. Louder stomachs. Small signs.

Bills $874. Net -$874. 0 new patients waitlisted. Reputation does the recruiting now.

log.title: Week 5 resolution
log.text:
No new gear this week. The clinic runs on what it already has.

Donor Brunch: A donor hosts brunch in your lobby. Quiche. Pastries. Patients arrive early and stay late.

Poster War: Their new billboard shows thin models in yoga pants. "Real wellness," it says. Your front desk staff glare at it through the window.

Week 5 closes. Daphne Novak adds 2.1 lb. Celeste Mori leaves 1.0 lb heavier.

No formal stage change this week. Tighter buttons. Louder stomachs. Small signs.

Bills $874. Net -$874. 0 new patients waitlisted. Reputation does the recruiting now.

log.title: Week 4 resolution
log.text:
No new gear this week. The clinic runs on what it already has.

Hunger Spiral: Half the roster reports "weird hunger" by midweek. Snack drawers empty. The clinic smells like bread.

Rival Juice Bar: ThriveWell Annex installs a juice bar across the street. Your patients smell kale. Two skip appointments. Reputation dips unless you answer.

Week 4 closes. Daphne Novak adds 2.3 lb. Celeste Mori leaves 0.6 lb heavier.

No formal stage change this week. Tighter buttons. Louder stomachs. Small signs.

Bills $874. Net -$874. 0 new patients waitlisted. Reputation does the recruiting now.

log.title: Week 3 resolution
log.text:
No new gear this week. The clinic runs on what it already has.

Late Supply Delivery: A supply crate arrives with bonus sample packs. Rich. Dense. Mislabeled as "fiber trial." Gone by morning.

Week 3 closes. Daphne Novak adds 1.9 lb. Celeste Mori leaves 0.5 lb heavier.

No formal stage change this week. Tighter buttons. Louder stomachs. Small signs.

Bills $874. Net -$874. 0 new patients on the roster. Word of mouth. Busy rooms.

log.title: Week 2 resolution
log.text:
No new gear this week. The clinic runs on what it already has.

Blogger Visit: A food blogger films in the waiting lounge. Your chairs trend. Three new patients call before lunch.

Week 2 closes. Daphne Novak adds 2.8 lb. Celeste Mori leaves 0.6 lb heavier.

No formal stage change this week. Tighter buttons. Louder stomachs. Small signs.

Bills $874. Net -$874. 0 new patients on the roster. Word of mouth. Busy rooms.

log.title: Week 1 resolution
log.text:
No new gear this week. The clinic runs on what it already has.

Feast Season: Double food event weight. Wardrobe strain +10%.

Holiday Feast Tray: A donor sends a holiday feast tray. Staff and patients share. Portion control dies with the first bite.

Week 1 closes. Daphne Novak adds 2.5 lb. Celeste Mori leaves 0.6 lb heavier.

No formal stage change this week. Tighter buttons. Louder stomachs. Small signs.

Bills $874. Net -$874. 0 new patients on the roster. Word of mouth. Busy rooms.

log.title: Lease signed
log.text: Strip-mall suite. One reception desk. Fluorescents hum. Your sign says primary care. Week one.
